content.text:
<analysis>
a. Summarize the event type and context:
This is a PULL_REQUEST event for PR #263 that reviews mouse Frmpd2 (FERM/PDZ scaffold protein). The PR is currently open, adds a complete AI review with 12 changed files including the main review YAML, research files, and cached publications.

b. Determine if this is a request for code review feedback or for implementation:
This is a request for code review feedback. The user explicitly asks me to "review this pull request and provide feedback on: Code quality and best practices, Potential bugs or issues, Performance considerations, Security concerns, Test coverage".

c. List key information from the provided data:
- PR adds Frmpd2 AI review with key decisions: REMOVE apical localization, MODIFY PI binding, NEW annotations for signaling adaptor activity
- Changed files include the main review YAML (521 lines), research files, UniProt/GOA data, and cached publications
- Test plan includes validation command: `just validate mouse Frmpd2`
- Repository has specific AI gene review guidelines in CLAUDE.md

d. Outline the main tasks and potential challenges:
- Read and analyze the main review file (Frmpd2-ai-review.yaml)
- Check adherence to schema and project guidelines from CLAUDE.md
- Validate the curation decisions (REMOVE, MODIFY, NEW annotations)
- Review supporting research and citations
- Check for consistency across files
- Potential challenge: Large files with complex biological content requiring domain knowledge

e. Propose a high-level plan of action:
1. Read CLAUDE.md to understand project guidelines
2. Review the main AI review YAML file for structure and content
3. Check supporting research and notes files
4. Validate against schema requirements and best practices
5. Run validation command if possible
6. Provide comprehensive feedback on the review decisions and file quality

f. Limitations:
I may not be able to run the validation command (`just validate mouse Frmpd2`) due to potential missing dependencies or permissions, but I can analyze the files manually against the schema and guidelines.
</analysis>

I'll review this pull request for the mouse Frmpd2 AI gene review. Let me start by creating a todo list and analyzing the changes.

input.body: ### Reviewing PR: Mouse Frmpd2 AI Review #### Todo List: - [ ] Read project guidelines from CLAUDE.md - [ ] Analyze main review file (Frmpd2-ai-review.yaml) - [ ] Review supporting research and notes - [ ] Check file consistency and citations - [ ] Validate against schema and best practices - [ ] Test validation command - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback #### Analysis in Progress... Reading project guidelines and analyzing the mouse Frmpd2 review files. --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24645596639)
